owner_operator_stated: Site describes Dr. Marcos Montoya, Dr. Rares Raibulet, and Dr. Kristine Guliana as partners at the practice; no single-owner statement.
notes: Address corroborated exactly (1560 Sherman Ave #902, Evanston, IL 60201) on the contact page. Note: the site displays phone 847-396-9838, which differs from the record's listed phone (847) 864-8151 (third-party listings show 864-8151); corroboration relies on the address match. No careers/hiring page found. No DSO/multi-location affiliation mentioned; practice founded 1959.

Address+phone corroborated exactly (820 Davis Street Suite 460, Evanston, IL 60201, 847-332-2226) on ProCare Dental Group's locations page, which lists this office as its 'Lakeside Dentistry' brand -- one of 10 locations under the ProCare Dental Group, P.C. umbrella (multi-location group; CEO Dr. Robert G. Brunetti). No dedicated location subpage, doctor roster, or careers page could be found for this specific office. Vendor hint domain Lakeside-Dentistry.Com is a DIFFERENT, unrelated independent practice in Rochester, MN (24 W Silver Lake Dr NE, phone 507-282-8222) -- confirmed not to be this entity; do not confuse the two.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Charles Chen founded and has run the practice since 2003 (owner).
notes: Address (1632 Maple Ave, Evanston, IL 60201) and phone (847) 328-3573 corroborated exactly. Single-location independent practice, no DSO affiliation mentioned. No careers/hiring page found.

owner_operator_stated: Site title/homepage identifies the practice as run by Dr. M. Gordon and Dr. W. Gordon (owners).
notes: Direct page fetches returned HTTP 403 (bot-blocked); address (635 Chicago Avenue, Evanston, Suite 6) and phone (847-491-0880) plus doctor names were corroborated via search-engine snippets quoting the site's own contact-us and meet-us pages. Independent 2-dentist practice, no DSO mention. A separate, differently-named 'Northshore Dental Partners PLLC' also appears in search results -- not confirmed to be the same entity as this record; treated as unrelated.

owner_operator_stated: Frank L. Karkazis is listed as President; site names Dr. Frank, Dr. Alexander, and Dr. Emelia Karkazis as the practice's dentists.
notes: Address (1029 West Howard Street, Evanston, IL 60202) and phone (847) 491-0660 corroborated exactly. Also operates locally under the DBA 'Karkazis Dental & Orthodontics' at the same address per third-party listings -- a family-run (Karkazis family) practice, not a DSO. Guessed careers URLs (/careers, /careers-1) both returned 404; no hiring page found.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Rosemarie Buen opened Signature Smiles Dental Care in 1998 (owner/founder).
notes: Address (1128 Lake St, Suite 1, Oak Park, IL 60301) and phone (708) 386-6190 corroborated exactly. Record lists provider_count=3 but the website only names one dentist (owner Dr. Buen); no associates named by site, no careers/hiring page found.
